title: You Must Have The Rain
body:
<div align="center">

## <ins>**About**</ins>

<div align="left">

This mod adds rainbows to your world that have a chance to appear after a rain or a thunderstorm ends that last for 5 minutes. As well as moonbows that can appear during the night as long as it is a full moon alongside a few surprises if you are playing with it in the month of June :3 

<div align="center">
  
![default rainbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/143bce5c2b20b79d339263dea2a50ecf496bef0b_0.webp)
![moonbows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/052dc3386c983b2ff28c3c61accf2e30b67aba0a_0.webp)

<div align="left">
  
### <ins>**Future plans:**</ins>

<div align="left">

- Directional rain and snow. (Rain and snow fall between 0-45 degree angle from any direction the angle can change overtime)
- Lunar Eclipses. 
- Water ripples when rain touches water.
- Light pillars in snowy biomes during sunset.
- A way to make mini rainbows using waterfalls.
- Auroras that last for a week every minecraft month.
